task: push the door to the left side
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A white door is partially open, hinged on the right side. A robotic arm is positioned to the left of the door. The door is a rigid object with a flat surface; the hinge is on the right edge. **STRATEGY -** Reach the door, grasp its flat surface to apply a pushing force, and move the arm to the left to push the door. Failure modes include insufficient force or misalignment. **AFFORDANCE REASONING -** Step 1 reach the door body; Step 2 grasp the door surface for stable push; Step 3 push left to move the door.

Goal: left_of(white_door, door_hinge); stable(white_door)
Scene: white_door, door_hinge, robotic_arm
Step 1: reach(white_door)
  affordance_region: the flat surface of the white door
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, white_door, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, white_door) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(white_door)
  affordance_region: the flat surface of the white door
  contact: holding(white_door) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(white_door)
Step 3: push(white_door -> left)
  affordance_region: the flat surface of the white door
  contact: pushing(white_door) [completion]
  spatial: left_of(white_door, door_hinge) [completion]
  direction: push_axis(-1, 0, 0) [completion]
  done_when: left_of(white_door, door_hinge)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the flat surface of the white door
the flat surface of the white door
the flat surface of the white door
